caption: Fourth of July week is going to break me. Booked solid at all three and Megan just texted that she can't come in tomorrow.
Megan?? Is she ok?
Car needs brakes apparently. A text at 9pm the night before isn't notice, it's a grenade.
Can you pull anyone from your other Naperville location?
Already called Lena from the Main St spot. She's not thrilled. I'll deal with it.
You're going to need a drink by Saturday lol
Craig's making dinner Friday. Small mercies.
Tell that man he's a saint. Sunday morning free at all? Coffee?
Megan?? Is she ok?
Car needs brakes apparently. A text at 9pm the night before isn't notice, it's a grenade.
Can you pull anyone from your other Naperville location?
Already called Lena from the Main St spot. She's not thrilled. I'll deal with it.

Fresh chrome set out of Main Street this morning — the light hit it just right. ✨
Marble French at Orchard Plaza. Two hours of tiny brushwork and worth every minute.
Fall palette is here: burnt orange, deep plum, and a warm taupe. Booking up fast at Wheaton.
Behind the scenes at Main Street — restocking the OPI wall before the weekend rush.
Prom season means glitter season. Orchard Plaza is ready. 💅
Cozy sweater-weather almond set from a regular at Wheaton. Obsessed with this one.
New lash and waxing rooms coming to Wheaton — licensing almost done. Stay tuned.
Sunday farmers-market flowers on the front desk at Orchard Plaza. Little things.
Holiday reds are in. Classic never misses. Book early at Wheaton.
Team lunch on a slow Tuesday at Main Street. These three run a tight floor.
Ombré pinks for a bride-to-be at Orchard Plaza. Congratulations, we're honored.
